build.beforeDevCommand: npm run build:sidecar-sebuf && node scripts/build-sidecar-handlers.mjs && npm run dev

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https: http://localhost:5173 http://127.0.0.1:* ws: wss: blob: data: https://abacus.worldview.app; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://www.youtube.com https://abacus.worldview.app https://*.clerk.accounts.dev; worker-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self' data: https:; media-src 'self' data: blob: https: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; frame-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* https://worldview.app https://tech.worldview.app https://finance.worldview.app https://commodity.worldview.app https://happy.worldview.app https://energy.worldview.app https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://webcams.windy.com https://*.clerk.accounts.dev;

bundle.shortDescription: WorldView desktop app (supports World and Tech variants)
bundle.longDescription: WorldView desktop app for real-time global intelligence. Build with VITE_VARIANT=tech to package Tech Monitor branding and dataset defaults.
